citations.description: Employer did not develop, document and utilize machine-specific energy control procedures.
citations.abatement_status: Open - Partial procedures drafted (12 of ~30 assets)

citations.description: Written Hazard Communication program incomplete; chemical inventory and SDS not current.
citations.abatement_status: In Progress - SDS updates underway with vendor portal

citations.description: Powered industrial truck operator training evaluations not conducted at least once every three years.

inspections.notes: CSP referral suggested follow-up on LOTO program completion and PIT/pedestrian interface at docks.
